steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The subject is "The collection," and the sentence needs a finite main verb to state what the First Folio collection does. A participle or infinitive cannot serve as the main verb here.

steps.title: Match singular agreement
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C are infinitive forms, so they leave the sentence without a finite verb. Choice B is a participle and also creates a fragment. The singular subject needs the present-tense verb "includes." The answer is D.
